sections.description: Annual Bible reading plan plugin with Today and Annual Table shortcodes, Elementor widgets, progress tracking, a dedicated reader page option, and a scripture reader/importer.
sections.changelog:
0.4.4

  • Updated the frontend styling with the latest BIY design system for the Today, Annual Table, and Reader views.
  • Improved responsive behavior for the annual reading table and reader layout on smaller screens.
  • Added plugin update support using a remote JSON manifest.
  • Connected plugin updates to the BIY GitHub update manifest.
